title: premna glandulosa
intro: Premna glandulosa, also known as Indian gooseberry or Premna, is a tropical plant species native to the Indian subcontinent. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant has several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. Premna glandulosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and wounds.
